health_conditions: post-operative day 9 from tummy tuck with muscle repair and breast lift/augmentation

benefits.description: Excellent results in the realm of inflammation/swelling with overall minimal swelling for tummy tuck
Reduced swelling early on; incisions look fantastic for 9 days post-op
Hopeful for quick scar reduction/lightening as well

protocol_notes: Started KLOW on POD 1 following cosmetic surgery (tummy tuck with muscle repair and breast lift/augmentation). User mentioned 'Wolverine stack' as alternative. Discontinued KLOW at POD 9 and planned to restart at 4 weeks post-op due to concern about hypertrophic scarring from early anti-inflammatory effects during proliferative phase. One small raised/thick area on breast noted, otherwise incisions looking good with expected firmness around abdominal incision.
